narrative:
Precinct Palmyra B (precinct in Portage County) has 632 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a clear Republican lean of 7.3 percentage points.
